title: [ImportVerilog] Detect and fixup two-state-exhaustive case statements

features.name: two-state-exhaustive case statement
features.description: Code should include a case statement where all 2^N values of an N-bit expression are covered, assuming two-state logic, but the expression uses a four-state type like logic

features.name: four-state logic type in case expression
features.description: Code should include a case statement where the case expression uses logic type (four-state) but the case items only cover two-state values

features.name: always_comb with exhaustive case
features.description: Code should include an always_comb block containing a case statement that appears exhaustive for two-state logic
